title: After a saga of broken promises, a European rover finally has a ride to Mars
summary: Europe's Mars rover mission has secured its fourth rocket after years of delays—SpaceX's Falcon Heavy will finally deliver the rover to the red planet. This marks the end of a prolonged saga of cancelled and rescheduled launch contracts.
content: Europe's first Mars rover mission is now on its fourth rocket: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy.

zh.title: 经过一系列破碎的承诺，欧洲火星车终于有了去火星的交通工具
zh.summary: 欧洲火星车任务在多年延误后终于确保了第四枚火箭——SpaceX的猎鹰重型火箭将最终把火星车送上红色星球。这标志着长期取消和重新安排发射合同的故事告一段落。

title: New leaders, new fund: Sequoia has raised $7B to expand its AI bets
summary: Sequoia Capital has raised $7 billion in new capital under its restructured leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards. The fundraise represents the 54-year-old firm's first major capital raise under new management as it expands its artificial intelligence investment strategy.
content: The fundraise is the first major capital raise under Sequoia's new leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards of the 54-year-old firm.

zh.title: 新领导，新基金：红杉资本筹集70亿美元扩大AI投资
zh.summary: 红杉资本在新的领导架构下筹集了70亿美元新资本，由Alfred Lin和Pat Grady担任共同管理人。这次融资是这家已有54年历史的公司在新管理层下的首次大规模融资，标志着其人工智能投资战略的扩展。
